UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION

FORM 10-Q

Item 1. Financial Statements

Balance sheet data follows.

Asset100

Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Our revenue grew during the quarter driven by strong cloud demand and continued enterprise adoption of our platform offerings.

Operating expenses increased modestly as we expanded headcount in research and development to support the next generation of products.

We expect the trends described above to continue into the next fiscal quarter, subject to macroeconomic conditions.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

The following risk factor updates supplement the risk factors disclosed in our most recent annual report on Form 10-K.

Recent geopolitical developments could affect our supply chain and customer demand in international markets.

Item 6. Exhibits

Exhibits filed with this report are listed in the exhibit index.
